# Data Model Checklist: Provide Partial Results When Some Open Data is Unavailable

**Purpose**: Ensure entities cover partial-result metadata and strict mode.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/028-partial-open-data-results/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Estimate results capture missing factors and reliability status.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Dataset availability tracks missing or timeout states.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Strict mode failures capture missing required datasets.
